mapper.select:
select distinct * from synlte.Fieldcode
DELETED=0
and ( upper(codeName) like upper('%${codeName}%')
or upper(codeText) like upper('%${codeText}%')
)
and upper(codeText) like upper('%${codeText}%')

select CODEVALID, CODEID, VALTEXT, MEMO, VALVALUE, SORTINDEX, VALTEXTTITLE ,ID from synlte.FIELDCODEVAL
AND upper(valValue) like upper('%${valValue}%')
AND upper(valText) like upper('%${valText}%')

select CODEVALID, CODEID, VALTEXT, MEMO, VALVALUE, SORTINDEX, VALTEXTTITLE ,ID from synlte.FIELDCODEVAL
AND upper(codeId)=upper(#{codeId})
AND upper(valValue) like upper('%${valValue}%')
AND upper(valText) like upper('%${valText}%')

select distinct * from synlte.fieldcode
DELETED=0
AND (codeId in (select parcodeid from synlte.fieldcode where upper(codeId)=upper(#{codeId})) or upper(codeId)=upper(#{codeId}))
and ( upper(codeName) like upper('%${codeName}%')
or upper(codeText) like upper('%${codeText}%')
)
and upper(codeText) like upper('%${codeText}%')
mapper.delete: delete from synlte.FIELDCODEVAL where upper(CODEVALID) = upper(#{codeValId}) and upper(valValue) = upper(#{valValue})
mapper.select: select count(0) from synlte.fieldcode WHERE upper(CODEID) = upper(#{codeId})

select distinct codeId as id , codeid as value , codetext as name from synlte.fieldcode
upper(codeId) like upper('%'||#{condition}||'%') or upper(codetext) like upper('%'||#{condition}||'%')
and codename != 'JZCODE_0024'
mapper.update: UPDATE synlte.fieldcode set CODENAME = #{codeName},CODETEXT=#{codeText},DELETED = 0, PARCODEID=#{parcodeId} , BROTHERCODEID=#{brotherCodeId} where upper(CODEID) = upper(#{codeId})
UPDATE synlte.FIELDCODE set DELETED = 1 where upper(CODEID) = upper(#{codeId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM synlte.FIELDCODEVAL WHERE upper(CODEID) = upper(#{codeId}) AND VALVALUE = #{valValue}

select DISTINCT codeid as value ,codetext as label from synlte.fieldcode -- select t.codeid as value , t.codetext as label from -- (select a.*, row_number() over(partition by a.codetext order by a.codeid desc) rn from synlte.fieldcode a) t where t.rn=1
codename != 'JZCODE_0024'
(upper(codetext) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%'))))

select codetext from synlte.fieldcode where codeid = #{codeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and codename='JZCODE0024'
